title: lissochilus ochyrae
intro: Lissochilus ochyrae is a species of orchid that is native to tropical Africa. It is a terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots and rhizomes, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The roots of Lissochilus ochyrae are used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are believed to have health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
